title: camelina sativa subsp. microcarpa
intro: Camelina sativa subsp. microcarpa, also known as micro-seed oil plant, is a subspecies of Camelina sativa, a flowering plant native to Europe. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly high in omega-3 fatty acids, which have anti-inflammatory effects and support heart health. The plant's seeds and oil have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Camelina sativa subsp. microcarpa oil can be prepared into herbal products such as supplements, cosmetics, and cooking oils, making it a versatile and valuable plant resource.
